words.laoTranslation: ເຄົາລົບນັບຖື, ເອົາເປັນແບບຢ່າງ
words.thaiTranslation: เคารพนับถือ, ยกย่องชื่นชม
words.definition: Respect and admire someone.
words.exampleSentence: Schoolchildren need positive role models to look up to.

words.laoTranslation: ຈັດຕັ້ງ, ສ້າງຕັ້ງ / ຕິດຕັ້ງ
words.thaiTranslation: จัดตั้ง, ก่อตั้ง / ติดตั้งระบบ
words.definition: Establish a business, organization, or system.
words.exampleSentence: She plans to set up her own consulting firm next month.

words.laoTranslation: ຖອດແບບ, ຄືກັນກັບ (ພໍ່ແມ່)
words.thaiTranslation: ถอดแบบ, เหมือน (พ่อหรือแม่)
words.definition: Resemble a parent or relative in appearance or character.
words.exampleSentence: He takes after his father in his love for classical music.

words.laoTranslation: ເຮັດໃຫ້ຫຼຸດລົງ / ໂຄ່ນລົ້ມ
words.thaiTranslation: ทำให้ลดลง / โค่นล้มอำนาจ
words.definition: Reduce costs/prices, or cause a government to lose power.
words.exampleSentence: The central bank actions managed to bring down inflation.

words.laoTranslation: ຫຼຸດພົ້ນຈາກການຖືກລົງໂທດ
words.thaiTranslation: รอดพ้นจากความผิด, ทำผิดแล้วไม่โดนลงโทษ
words.definition: Escape punishment for a wrongful action.
words.exampleSentence: He thought he could get away with cheating on the exam.

words.laoTranslation: ການກວດສອບຢ່າງລະອຽດ
words.thaiTranslation: การตรวจสอบอย่างละเอียด
words.definition: Critical observation or examination.
words.exampleSentence: The company's accounts were subjected to intense scrutiny.

words.laoTranslation: ທີ່ພົບເຫັນທົ່ວໄປ, ແຜ່ຫຼາຍ
words.thaiTranslation: ที่พบได้บ่อย, แพร่หลาย
words.definition: Widespread in a particular area or at a particular time.
words.exampleSentence: These diseases are more prevalent among young children.

words.laoTranslation: ຜູ້ສະໜັບສະໜູນ, ທະນາຍຄວາມ
words.thaiTranslation: ผู้สนับสนุน, ผู้ให้การสนับสนุน
words.definition: A person who publicly supports or recommends a particular cause or policy.
words.exampleSentence: She is a passionate advocate for organic farming.

words.laoTranslation: ຜິດປົກກະຕິ, ແປກປະຫຼາດ
words.thaiTranslation: ผิดปกติ, แปลกแยกไป
words.definition: Deviating from what is standard, normal, or expected.
words.exampleSentence: The scientists noted an anomalous test result in the laboratory.

words.laoTranslation: ເສີມກຳລັງ, ສະໜັບສະໜູນ
words.thaiTranslation: เสริมกำลัง, สนับสนุนให้เข้มแข็ง
words.definition: Support or strengthen; prop up.
words.exampleSentence: The new evidence will bolster the defense's argument.

words.laoTranslation: ສອດຄ່ອງກັນ, ເປັນເຫດເປັນຜົນ
words.thaiTranslation: เชื่อมโยงกัน, เป็นเหตุเป็นผล
words.definition: Logical and consistent.
words.exampleSentence: He failed to give a coherent explanation for his behavior.

words.laoTranslation: ກຳນົດຂອບເຂດ, ພັນລະນາຊັດເຈນ
words.thaiTranslation: กำหนดขอบเขต, อธิบายอย่างชัดเจน
words.definition: Describe or portray (something) precisely.
words.exampleSentence: The contract should clearly delineate the responsibilities of both parties.

words.laoTranslation: ກຳຈັດໃຫ້ໝົດສິ້ນ
words.thaiTranslation: กำจัดจนหมดสิ้น, ถอนรากถอนโคน
words.definition: Destroy completely; put an end to.
words.exampleSentence: The government aims to eradicate poverty within a decade.

words.laoTranslation: ໂດຍບັງເອີນ (ໃນທາງດີ)
words.thaiTranslation: โดยบังเอิญ (ในทางดี), โชคดี
words.definition: Happening by accident or chance rather than design; fortunate.
words.exampleSentence: The timely arrival of the inspector was fortuitous.

words.laoTranslation: ຮ້າຍແຮງ, ເຈັບປວດຫຼາຍ
words.thaiTranslation: ร้ายแรง, เจ็บปวดรวดร้าว
words.definition: Very severe or serious (of something bad).
words.exampleSentence: His death was a grievous loss to the entire community.

words.laoTranslation: ທີ່ມີຢູ່ພາຍໃນ, ຕິດໂຕມາແຕ່ເກີດ
words.thaiTranslation: ที่มีอยู่ภายใน, เป็นคุณสมบัติประจำตัว
words.definition: Existing in something as a permanent, essential, or characteristic attribute.
words.exampleSentence: There are inherent risks in any new business venture.

words.laoTranslation: ມີວິຈາລະນະຍານ, ຮອບຄອບ
words.thaiTranslation: มีวิจารณญาณ, รอบคอบสมเหตุสมผล
words.definition: Having, showing, or done with good judgment or sense.
words.exampleSentence: A judicious use of resources will save the company money.

words.laoTranslation: ຄຳຊົມເຊີຍ, ກຽດຕິຍົດ
words.thaiTranslation: คำชมเชย, เกเกียรติยศชื่อเสียง
words.definition: Praise and honor received for an achievement.
words.exampleSentence: The young architect won kudos for his innovative design.

words.laoTranslation: ເຊື່ອງຊຶມ, ເຫງົານອນ, ອ່ອນເພຍ
words.thaiTranslation: เฉื่อยชา, เฉื่อยแฉะ, อ่อนเพลียไร้แรง
words.definition: Affected by lethargy; sluggish and apathetic.
words.exampleSentence: The hot weather made everyone feel lethargic.

words.laoTranslation: ໂລກໄພໄຂ້ເຈັບ, ບັນຫາຮ້າຍແຮງ
words.thaiTranslation: โรคภัยไข้เจ็บ, ปัญหาร้ายแรงในสังคม
words.definition: A disease or ailment.
words.exampleSentence: Violent crime is a malady that afflicts many cities.

words.laoTranslation: ຊົ່ວຮ້າຍ, ເລວທາມ
words.thaiTranslation: ชั่วร้าย, อำมหิตผิดมนุษย์
words.definition: Wicked, impious, or criminal (typically of an action or activity).
words.exampleSentence: The hackers used nefarious means to access confidential files.

words.laoTranslation: ມົວໝອງ, ບໍ່ຊັດເຈນ, ບໍ່ມີຊື່ສຽງ
words.thaiTranslation: ไม่ชัดเจน, คลุมเครือ, ไม่เป็นที่รู้จัก
words.definition: Not discovered or known about; uncertain.
words.exampleSentence: The origins of the custom remain obscure.

words.laoTranslation: ທີ່ມີແນວໂນ້ມຈະເປັນ
words.thaiTranslation: ที่มีแนวโน้มจะเป็น, นอนคว่ำ
words.definition: Likely to or liable to suffer from, do, or experience something.
words.exampleSentence: Tired drivers are prone to making careless mistakes.

words.laoTranslation: ຄວາມກັງວົນໃຈ, ຄວາມຮູ້ສຶກຜິດ
words.thaiTranslation: ความกังวลใจ, ความรู้สึกผิดในใจ
words.definition: An uneasy feeling of doubt, worry, or fear, especially about one's own conduct.
words.exampleSentence: She had no qualms about lying to her boss.

words.laoTranslation: ແຂງແຮງ, ທົນທານ
words.thaiTranslation: แข็งแรง, ทนทานไม่พังง่าย
words.definition: Sturdy in construction; strongly made; healthy and strong.
words.exampleSentence: The company has developed a robust system for data security.

words.laoTranslation: ເຊື່ອມຄວາມແຕກຕ່າງ, ຫຼຸດຊ່ອງຫວ່າງ
words.thaiTranslation: เชื่อมช่องว่าง, ลดความแตกต่าง
words.definition: To connect two different groups or reduce differences.
words.exampleSentence: The mentoring program aims to bridge the gap between generations.

words.laoTranslation: ຜິດສันຍາ
words.thaiTranslation: ผิดสัญญา
words.definition: To fail to do what you said you would do.
words.exampleSentence: If you break a promise, people will lose trust in you.

words.laoTranslation: ຮ່ວມມືກັນอย่างໃກ້ຊິດ
words.thaiTranslation: ร่วมมือกันอย่างใกล้ชิด
words.definition: Working together tightly with another party.
words.exampleSentence: The designers worked in close collaboration with the engineers.

words.laoTranslation: ສະຫຼຸບຜົນ
words.thaiTranslation: สรุปผล, ได้ข้อสรุป
words.definition: To deduce or form an opinion after looking at facts.
words.exampleSentence: It is too early to draw a conclusion from this data.

words.laoTranslation: ຫາລ້ຽງຊີບ
words.thaiTranslation: หาเลี้ยงชีพ
words.definition: To earn money to pay for your basic living requirements.
words.exampleSentence: He earns a living as a freelance graphic designer.

words.laoTranslation: ໄດ້ຮັບຄວາມເຂົ້າໃຈເລິກເຊິ່ງ
words.thaiTranslation: ได้รับความรู้ความเข้าใจลึกซึ้ง
words.definition: To acquire a deep understanding of a complex issue.
words.exampleSentence: The research helped us gain insight into consumer behavior.

words.laoTranslation: ການສູນເສຍຢ່າງໜັກໜ່ວງ
words.thaiTranslation: การสูญเสียอย่างหนัก
words.definition: A severe amount of financial damage or casualties.
words.exampleSentence: The company suffered a heavy loss in the second quarter.

words.laoTranslation: ອອກຄຳສັ່ງຫ້າມ
words.thaiTranslation: ออกคำสั่งห้าม, บังคับใช้คำสั่งห้าม
words.definition: To officially stop something from being done or used.
words.exampleSentence: The city decided to impose a ban on single-use plastics.

words.laoTranslation: ເຮັດວຽກໃຫ້ທັນກຳນົດເວລາ
words.thaiTranslation: ทำงานส่งทันตามกำหนดเวลา
words.definition: To finish a task by the agreed time limit.
words.exampleSentence: We had to work overtime to meet the deadline.

words.laoTranslation: ບຳລຸງສ້າງຜູ້ມີພອນສະຫວັນ
words.thaiTranslation: ฟูมฟักผู้มีความสามารถ
words.definition: To support and encourage the development of skills.
words.exampleSentence: The academy was founded to nurture young talent in tennis.

words.laoTranslation: ເປັນເລື່ອງບັງເອີນແທ້ໆ
words.thaiTranslation: เป็นเรื่องบังเอิญอย่างแท้จริง
words.definition: Completely unintended without any planning.
words.exampleSentence: Our meeting at the airport was purely accidental.

words.laoTranslation: ບັນລຸການປະນີປະນອມ
words.thaiTranslation: บรรลุข้อตกลงร่วมกัน, ประนีประนอม
words.definition: To come to an agreement where both sides make concessions.
words.exampleSentence: After hours of discussion, they managed to reach a compromise.

words.laoTranslation: ເຮັດເປັນແບບຢ່າງ
words.thaiTranslation: ทำตัวเป็นแบบอย่าง
words.definition: To behave in a way that other people should copy.
words.exampleSentence: Managers should set an example of hard work for their staff.

words.laoTranslation: ຜ່ານການປ່ຽនແປງ
words.thaiTranslation: ผ่านการเปลี่ยนแปลง
words.definition: To experience shifts, modifications, or transformations.
words.exampleSentence: The historic old town has undergone major changes recently.

words.laoTranslation: ເໜືອກວ່າຢ່າງຫຼວງຫຼາຍ
words.thaiTranslation: ดีกว่าอย่างเห็นได้ชัด, เหนือกว่าอย่างมาก
words.definition: Of a much higher quality or standard than alternatives.
words.exampleSentence: The new engine model is vastly superior to the previous version.

words.definition: The occurrence of events by chance in a happy or beneficial way
words.exampleSentence: Finding this restaurant was pure serendipity.

words.definition: Lasting for a very short time
words.exampleSentence: Fashions are ephemeral; trends come and go overnight.

words.definition: Present, appearing, or found everywhere
words.exampleSentence: Smartphones have become ubiquitous in modern society.

words.definition: The capacity to recover quickly from difficulties; toughness
words.exampleSentence: Her resilience in the face of adversity was inspiring.

words.definition: Fluent or persuasive in speaking or writing
words.exampleSentence: She gave an eloquent speech that moved the audience.

words.definition: Dealing with things sensibly and realistically
words.exampleSentence: We need a pragmatic approach to solve this problem.

words.definition: Open to more than one interpretation; having a double meaning
words.exampleSentence: The contract was ambiguous about payment terms.

words.definition: Truthful and straightforward; frank
words.exampleSentence: She was candid about her reasons for leaving.

words.definition: Having or showing care and conscientiousness in work or duties
words.exampleSentence: He was a diligent student who always completed his assignments.

words.definition: The quality of being thankful; readiness to show appreciation
words.exampleSentence: She expressed her gratitude for all the help she received.

words.laoTranslation: ຄວາມຄິດຮອດ
words.thaiTranslation: ความคิดถึง
words.definition: A sentimental longing for the past
words.exampleSentence: Looking at old photos filled her with nostalgia.

words.laoTranslation: ລະອຽດລະອຽດ
words.thaiTranslation: พิถีพิถัน
words.definition: Showing great attention to detail; very careful and precise
words.exampleSentence: The research was conducted with meticulous care.

words.definition: The occurrence of events by chance in a happy or beneficial way
words.exampleSentence: Finding this restaurant was pure serendipity.

words.exampleSentence: Fashions are ephemeral; trends come and go overnight.

words.exampleSentence: Smartphones have become ubiquitous in modern society.

words.exampleSentence: Looking at old photos filled her with nostalgia.

words.exampleSentence: We need a pragmatic approach to solve this problem.

words.exampleSentence: She was candid about her reasons for leaving.

words.exampleSentence: He was a diligent student who always completed his assignments.

words.exampleSentence: She expressed her gratitude for all the help she received.

words.thaiTranslation: ความคิดถึง
words.definition: A sentimental longing for the past
words.exampleSentence: Looking at old photos filled her with nostalgia.

words.thaiTranslation: พิถีพิถัน
